description_long: This object consists of three identical potted plants arranged in a loose triangular grouping. Each plant features broad, elongated green leaves that radiate outward from a central stem, giving a lush and healthy appearance. The pots are spherical and appear to be made of a concrete-like material, with a distinctive geometric black band wrapping around each one, adding a modern, urban aesthetic. The surface of the pots is matte and slightly textured, contrasting with the smooth, semi-glossy leaves. There are no visible drainage holes or plant labels attached to the pots. The overall design suggests these plants are intended as decorative elements for contemporary urban environments.
description: A trio of modern potted plants with broad green leaves in spherical, geometric-patterned concrete pots, arranged together for decorative urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three potted plants with their leaves fanned out and the geometric black bands on the pots clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the staggered arrangement and the overlapping leaves, with the pots' geometric patterns partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view where the backs of the pots and the symmetry of the leaf arrangement are more apparent, with less visibility of the black bands.
description_view_3: Side view showing the depth of the arrangement and the way the leaves extend outward, partially obscuring the pots behind.
attribute_plant_species: broadleaf tropical (e.g., Aspidistra or generic houseplant)
